name: Reinforced Bumper
description: Increases damage dealt by occupants by 10%.
card_image_description: A border of dark metal with red and black diagonal hazard stripes. The image is a close-up of a massive, black steel bumper with heavy-duty welds and a bullbar being bolted onto the front of a vehicle.

name: Spiked Wheels
description: Increases damage dealt by occupants by 15%.
card_image_description: A border of dark metal with red and black diagonal hazard stripes. The image is a close-up shot of a rugged, off-road tire where large, sharp metal spikes have been bolted through the tread, looking menacing.

name: Mounted Machine Gun
description: Increases damage dealt by occupants by 20%.
card_image_description: A border of dark metal with red and black diagonal hazard stripes. The image shows a heavy machine gun on a swivel mount in a workshop, with a belt of ammunition feeding into it, ready for installation.

name: Charged Laser Cannon
description: Increases damage dealt by occupants by 25%.
card_image_description: A border of dark metal with red and black diagonal hazard stripes. The image shows a sleek, futuristic laser cannon on a turret. Coils along the barrel glow with intense red energy, and heat haze shimmers around the muzzle.

name: System-Enhanced Munitions
description: Increases damage dealt by occupants by 30%.
card_image_description: A border of dark metal with red and black diagonal hazard stripes. The image shows a row of large-caliber bullets laid out on a table. The tips of the projectiles are glowing with a bright, crackling blue energy.

name: Armor Plating
description: Reduces damage taken by occupants by 5%.
card_image_description: A border of heavy, bolted blue steel plates. The image shows several thick, overlapping plates of dark, scarred steel being riveted onto the side of a car door.

name: Bulletproof Glass
description: Reduces damage taken by occupants by 10%.
card_image_description: A border of heavy, bolted blue steel plates. The image is a cross-section of a car window, showing multiple thick layers of glass and polymer. A bullet is embedded halfway through, stopped from penetrating.

name: Reactive Armor
description: Reduces damage taken by occupants by 15%.
card_image_description: A border of heavy, bolted blue steel plates. The image is a close-up of several brick-like modules of Explosive Reactive Armor (ERA) bolted onto the side of a vehicle. One brick has a scorch mark on it.

name: Energy Shield Emitter
description: Reduces damage taken by occupants by 20%.
card_image_description: A border of heavy, bolted blue steel plates. The image shows a high-tech, circular device with glowing blue components mounted on a vehicle's roof, emitting a faint, shimmering, dome-shaped energy field.

name: Aegis Barrier Field
description: Reduces damage taken by occupants by 25%.
card_image_description: A border of heavy, bolted blue steel plates. The image shows a powerful, advanced emitter projecting a solid, bright blue hexagonal energy field that visibly deflects incoming red energy bolts.
